name: ◁ Za’atar & Feta Pasta Salad
servings: prep time: 10 minutes, plus 1 hour chilling

ingredients.item:
PASTA SALAD
8 ounces (225 g) pasta of choice (such as cavatelli, farfalle, or fusilli)
2 small Persian cucumbers, finely chopped
ingredients.original:
PASTA SALAD
8 ounces (225 g) pasta of choice (such as cavatelli, farfalle, or fusilli)
2 small Persian cucumbers, finely chopped

ingredients.item: ½ cup (55 g) sliced black olives
ingredients.original: ½ cup (55 g) sliced black olives

ingredients.item: ½ cup (30 g) finely chopped green onions
ingredients.original: ½ cup (30 g) finely chopped green onions

ingredients.item: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley
ingredients.original: ½ cup (25 g) finely chopped fresh parsley

ingredients.item: ½ cup (60 g) chopped sun-dried tomatoes
ingredients.original: ½ cup (60 g) chopped sun-dried tomatoes

ingredients.item:
DRESSING
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice
2 tablespoons za’atar
ingredients.original:
DRESSING
¼ cup (60 ml) fresh lemon juice
2 tablespoons za’atar

ingredients.item: 1 TO MAKE THE PASTA SALAD: Cook the pasta to al dente according to the package directions.
ingredients.original: 1 TO MAKE THE PASTA SALAD: Cook the pasta to al dente according to the package directions.

ingredients.item: 2 Meanwhile, add the cucumbers, olives, green onions, parsley, sun-dried tomatoes, and feta to a medium salad bowl.
ingredients.original: 2 Meanwhile, add the cucumbers, olives, green onions, parsley, sun-dried tomatoes, and feta to a medium salad bowl.

ingredients.item: 3 When the pasta is cooked, drain and run under cold water to cool it, then add it to the salad bowl.
ingredients.original: 3 When the pasta is cooked, drain and run under cold water to cool it, then add it to the salad bowl.

ingredients.item: 4 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, za’atar, oil, salt, Dijon mustard, and honey until well combined.
ingredients.original: 4 TO MAKE THE DRESSING: In a small bowl, whisk together the lemon juice, za’atar, oil, salt, Dijon mustard, and honey until well combined.

ingredients.item: 5 Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine well.
ingredients.original: 5 Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine well.

ingredients.item: 6 Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.
ingredients.original: 6 Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving.

ingredients.item:
BEAN SALAD
38 ounces (1.1 kg) mixed canned beans, drained and rinsed
1 cup (50 g) finely chopped parsley
ingredients.original:
BEAN SALAD
38 ounces (1.1 kg) mixed canned beans, drained and rinsed
1 cup (50 g) finely chopped parsley
